_doc: Cycles whose consumption has been drawn down from data/inventory.json via `deplete --apply`. deplete.py appends here automatically on --apply; run_week.py's preflight prints a loud nudge when the PRIOR cycle is missing (i.e. you're planning a new week on top of un-depleted inventory). Do not hand-edit except to seed history.
